series_metadata.series_title: STACC/SAIC SOPs/Policies for Administering the DHS CNSI Program
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but not limited to, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), policies, internal operating guidelines, and other administrative documents (e.g. Duty Officer schedule, EOD schedule, STE/IDS test results) setting forth the operation of the DHS Classified National Security Information (CNSI) Program, which is administered by the STACC/SAIC

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: most updated version superseded or obsolete ; Electronic: most updated version superseded or obsolete
